summary: Validated the M7 Beta performance, memory, and loading baseline on the contracted content set with no code changes. The evidence report captures host details, measured performance numbers, deterministic hashes, build/package artifact hashes, and the only test-ordering issue encountered during desktop security checking.

tests_run.result: Listed active tasks; M7-PERFORMANCE-MEMORY-LOADING-001 is in progress.

tests_run.command: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const task=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('project/tasks/active/M7-PERFORMANCE-MEMORY-LOADING-001.json','utf8')); const required=['id','summary','owner_role','reviewer_role','status','scope','acceptance_criteria','required_tests','risk_level','branch_or_worktree','route_to']; const missing=required.filter((key)=>!(key in task)); if (missing.length) { throw new Error('Missing keys: '+missing.join(',')); } console.log('task-json-ok', task.id, task.status, task.owner_role, task.reviewer_role);"

tests_run.result: No whitespace or patch formatting issues.

SIM-005 performance baseline passed on fixture m1.abstract-graph-30-world-state-v0; node v24.13.1; win32 x64; cpuCount=16; days=3650; finalDay=3650; finalRevision=3650; dayThroughputPerSecond=9136; p50StepNanoseconds=90500; p95StepNanoseconds=237800; p99StepNanoseconds=466300; saveByteLength=9980; saveNanoseconds=2355300; loadNanoseconds=4703700.
Node and Worker-compatible hashes matched for hello, command/query, save/load, M4 replay, M5 playable loop, and M6 Alpha loop.
Storybook build completed successfully and cleaned .tmp/storybook-static.
Playwright chromium suite passed: 21 tests, 21 passed.
First concurrent run failed with ENOTEMPTY while removing apps/desktop/dist/renderer/web/assets because pnpm desktop:package was running in parallel.
Desktop package smoke output written to .tmp/desktop-package/MonsoonSovereigns-win32-x64.
Serial rerun passed; Electron security preferences, preload bridge shape, renderer navigation restriction, and allowed IPC channels were verified.
Architecture boundaries passed; vitest suites passed; web tests passed; 353 tests passed in the root suite.
Prettier, ESLint, typecheck, and architecture checks passed.
Clean working tree after the evidence commit.

decisions: No code or fixture change was required; the task is satisfied by measured evidence capture and deterministic artifact hashing.
The desktop security check was serialized after an initial concurrent ENOTEMPTY failure because it shares the same build output tree with desktop:package.
risks: The performance baseline is a measurement capture, not a code fix; no explicit regression threshold was encoded in the task JSON, so QA should judge the evidence against the current baseline contract.
Desktop security checking is order-sensitive when run concurrently with desktop packaging; this is an execution hazard, not a product defect.
requested_action: Review the evidence report, measured baseline metrics, artifact hashes, and serialized desktop security/package results, then accept or request changes.
